title: Reflex Arena
description: Changelog and events of Reflex Arena

items.title: 1.3.1 – Free to Play
items.content_html:
Hey team!

As promised, we're moving to a free-to-play model, giving back to the community after all these years! We're also working on setting up a curated workshop for weapon skins (and potentially models), but wanted to get this point release out for the F2P launch.


Gameplay

  • Implemented zoom weapon FOV

  • Implemented spawn point visibility during warmup

  • Fixed positional audio not working correctly on some machines

  • Players are no longer auto re-queued in matchmaking when missing a pop


Forge

  • Fixed custom skin issues introduced in the 1.3.0 rebuild


Backend

  • No longer upgrade official servers while players are on them

  • Fixed invalid queue timeout (was causing longer-than-expected queues)

Cheers,
Shooter

items.title: 1.3.0 - Reflex Reloaded
items.content_html:
Hey all!

This update brings matchmaking back to life along with a bunch of quality of life (QoL) improvements.

Also will be going free to play (soon), so spread the word if you know anyone who might enjoy it.

It's been fun getting back into Reflex. Thanks to the community for sticking around throughout the years! <3

Community:
- Added #bug-reports to discord, where players can report / upvote bugs
- Added #feedback-and-suggestions to discord, where players can report / upvote features
- Join discord here -> https://discord.gg/reflex

QoL menu:
- updated menu music
- added training to home screen to guide new players
- training maps now progress automatically through the end of map scoreboard
- server browser can now mark servers as favorites
- server browser remembers your last sorting column

QoL game:
- updated ruleset to CR2
- added player weapon zoom
- chat log is now scrollable
- mutators no longer resurrect dead players if they deal damage after dying
- floating damage text now support scaling
- smoother `r_showfps` display
- reduced default volume levels
- better default weapon bindings
- bots now change off guns with no ammo
- spectator muting option: sv_mutespecs / callvote mutespecs

QoL rendering:
- r_monitor to select output monitor
- fixed bunch of alt-tabbing issues
- allow very high resolutions on Windows (5K2K monitors)
- added borderless windowed
- default resolution now 1080p

Matchmaking/Server:
- new matchmaking system - see reflextracker.gg
- official servers back online eu central + us west + us east
- redesigned matchmaking screen with MMR display
- Dedicated server now available for Linux
- MM is one click play with skill-matched bots (bots optional)

Stability & Performance:
- numerous crash fixes
- smoother performance profiler display
- uploaded steamworks lib, newer workshop maps load correctly now
- fixed fonts not being loaded properly resulting in fallbacks in Wine

Addons:
- .effect asset file had to be changed with 64bit upgrade, if you're overriding assets in addons they will fail to load now
- PlayerSpeed widget: option to hide "ups" unit text
- PlayerSpeed/MovementKeys widgets: race-only toggle

Under the hood eng changes:
- brought engine/repo back to life
- 32bit -> 64bit exe upgrade
- updated PhysX 3.3 -> 5.0, LuaJIT, Steamworks etc (required as libs were too dated)
- new crash reporter
- new MM backend

Note:
- If you need to access the old build, in steam right click reflex -> properties -> beta -> betacode: legacyreflex

-- Shooter
